title: Swipe Hook
description: A competitor hook saved from transcript dissection as inspiration reference. NOT for direct copying — used to inform hook structure and energy when running HookGenie.

hook_text.description: The exact opening words from the competitor's transcript (first 3 seconds / first line)

pattern.description: The HookGenie pattern this hook maps to — identified during dissection

why_it_works.description: 1-2 sentence analysis from dissection — why this hook drove engagement

url.description: Direct URL to the source video/reel

engagement.description: Engagement stats at time of discovery

competitor_angle.description: The contrast or angle the competitor used, if identifiable

topic_keywords.description: 3-6 keywords from the hook and content — used by /viral:script for relevance matching

source_video_title.description: The video title or first 100 chars of caption

used_count.description: How many times this swipe hook has influenced a /viral:script run

visual_hook.description: Visual hook analysis from video frame extraction (populated by /viral:discover Step 4)

on_screen.description: What appears on screen in first 3 seconds

text_overlays.description: Any text overlaid on the video

pattern_interrupt.description: Whether the visual breaks expected scroll patterns

pacing.description: Editing pace in the first 3-5 seconds
